storyInfo: Rhodes Island enters Bresk to continue their search, which attracts the attention of the city guards. After helping the search party out of a tricky situation, Imperial Guardswoman Eloysius Gorchekova informs them of abnormal Infected in the mines, and seeks cooperation with Rhodes Island in investigating the matter.

attributes.options: We need to find a safe route to the research institute.;Elysium?

attributes.content: <p=1>Central Far North Mining District, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Looks like my equipment's not working right, it can't detect the precise range of the contamination.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I think this is the miners' accommodation. The real danger here might be whoever's still around, really. This is demonic contamination we're talking about.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Captain says there's no trace of any mental activity in the entire mine, human or animal.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: At the very least, the contamination hasn't blocked the way to the institute. It's mostly headed south, actually.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: We can swing a detour around the north. It'll take us roughly three hours longer than the original plan, but the time loss will be manageable.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Wow...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I've been thinking this for a while now, but you two work really well together!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Elysium and Mantra have been working together for many years now.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Hahaha... You could say I'm Rhodes Island's most experienced operator when it comes to working with the captain.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: It takes a lot out of her to 'speak', so if it's not an emergency, I get to be the one passing on the message.
attributes.name: Elysium
Elysium
attributes.content: So, what do you think, Doctor? If we set off now, we should make it before sunset—

attributes.name: Elysium
attributes.content: Not that the sun sets in the Ursine Far North this time of year...
attributes.joined: So, what do you think, Doctor? If we set off now, we should make it before sunset— Not that the sun sets in the Ursine Far North this time of year...

attributes.options: We set off right now.;Get our friend up to speed on our detour.

attributes.content: Don't fall behind now, Eloysius.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Sorry, was just inspecting the mine equipment, nothing to do with our travels together.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: What's going on? Why did you stop for so long?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: According to the map, we're very close to the institute. Don't tell me you've found some—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: ...thing?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It's... traces of Dominion.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Royal Guard was here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You don't seem shocked?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I hope you're not insinuating I'm hiding something, Gospozha Amiya, or I'd be very hurt.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I hope you share any pertinent information with us, at least while we are collaborating.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What do you know about the whereabouts of the Royal Guard?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: First of all, only the Tsar himself has the authority to know the comings and goings of the Royal Guard, let alone a lowly sergeant such as myself.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But honestly speaking, after the illustrious Grand Duchess of the Far North declared martial law and shut down the mines, the Royal Guard showing up would not be much of a shock.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Then, if they're already conducting an investigation of their own here, where does that leave you?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You're a clever one, aren't you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The news of abnormal Infected miners in Central Far North has made waves, and many are curious.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Naturally, while most Ursine have a right to curiosity, they do not have the same right to information.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Please understand that, as a sergeant, I am limited in what I am allowed to say. I hope my explanation will not cause too much confusion, Gospozha Amiya.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No, it's fine. I understand the position you are in.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I've never minced words about how this job could improve the résumé of an Imperial Guardswoman like me.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Though I did imagine it being much easier...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Anyhow, that dream is dead. The Royal Guard being involved is a bad omen, no matter how you look at it.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: If that's the case, are you still set on traveling with us?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Of course. I chose to take on this task, and quitting halfway would hardly be the decent thing to do.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Before we continue onwards, shall we reaffirm our trust in one another?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I look forward to our continued cooperation.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Just like the time we met...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: <p=1>Bresk, Far North, Ursus</><p=2>Three days ago</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.options: Elysium! Give us some direction!

attributes.content: Mierda... The signal's all laggy, it's like there's something interfering with our encrypted frequency!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Whatever, not important... Ten guardsmen to your west, turn right at the next crossing!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: What are you talking about?! The west is on our right!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Did I say right? Gah—
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Do you see the city hall? Go in the opposite direction!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I see it, but the crossing ahead is where the plates are disconnected—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What?!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: There's nothing like that on this stupid map!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Well, you're practically surrounded by guards, so that's your only way out!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Got it.
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Can you keep up, Amiya?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: I can!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Hold on tight, Doctor!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: Doing my best here—

attributes.content: Your best isn't good enough. Fine, I'll hold onto you instead!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Phew...
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: You alright, Doctor?
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.options: I'm good.;I've gotten pretty used to it by now.;Next time, I can try running by myself.

attributes.content: Haha, glad you're doing well! Guess I can relax, then!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: We've arrived at the designated location, Elysium.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Elysium?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: ...Don't...*bzzt*...stop...oving...*bzzt*—
attributes.name: Intermittent Noise

attributes.content: ...There's...*bzzt* *bzzt*...uards...
attributes.name: Intermittent Noise

attributes.content: The line cut out.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The terminal says Elysium's still moving, but we don't have any way to reestablish communication.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It's like short-range comms have been unstable ever since we entered Bresk.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There's also no way of telling if it's because of the Far North's extreme weather, or human interference.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: I am curious, though...;Why would Bresk send so many guards to detain 'inter-city merchants'?

attributes.content: It is rather strange...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There haven't been any issues with the ID cards Closure forged for us.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: Maybe we're not the ones they're watching out for.;Maybe they're watching us for different reasons.
But putting that aside...
Bresk is supposed to be a quiet city.;It's strange that it's so fortified.

attributes.content: This isn't anything like the intelligence we had... If this goes on, we won't make it into the mining district.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Doctor, shouldn't we rendezvous with Mantra's team and discuss—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Doctor! Finally got you!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Keep moving! There are guards heading your way!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.options: I think I figured that out, thanks...

attributes.content: They're fast—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Get behind me, Amiya!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: No, don't engage!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Alright, interloping scum, hands up!
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.options: Let's take a deep breath here.;What laws have we violated to cause such a fuss?

attributes.content: You trespassed in the industrial zone, and attempted to infiltrate a private factory, violating Bresk's migration regulations and Ursine urban public security measures.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Could I ask you to reconfirm, sir? When we entered the city, I'd never heard anything about a prohibition on foreigners entering the industrial zone—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It's a new regulation, went into effect just after you reached Bresk.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: You will be detained under the law, and then Public Security will decide if you are to be deported or exiled, considering your circumstances.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: If we inadvertently violated Bresk's new regulation, then I deeply apologize.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We're just here to look for an inter-city merchant. It was stated clearly in the itinerary declaration we submitted upon entry to the city.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Save it for Public Security.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.options: We didn't mean to offend.;There may be a way for both of us to save time here.
I believe Bresk, Pearl of the Far North, treats its guests well.;I'm sure the Grand Duchess is as kind as the rumors say.

attributes.content: Enough of that, I don't give a damn. I'm just doing my job.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Sir...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: This way.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: No, sir. We can't delay any longer.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm sorry.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You see Amiya shift her body, surreptitiously protecting you. Mon3tr observes your surroundings, looking for a way out.
You don't know how things work around here.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Get them.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: (Warning roar)
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Err... Ah!
attributes.name: Hesitant Soldier

attributes.content: What are you standing around for?! Get in there already!
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: What, can't even handle a little Feline girl?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: S...Sir, look behind them.
attributes.name: Hesitant Soldier

attributes.content: That looks like th-th-the—
attributes.name: Hesitant Soldier

attributes.content: Spit it out already!
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: —The Imperial Guard!
attributes.name: Hesitant Soldier

attributes.content: Yerunda! Those pretentious bastards should be in Grypherburg, what would they be doing in Bresk?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: B-But those clothes—
attributes.name: Hesitant Soldier

attributes.content: I am terribly sorry, sir, but I'm afraid she is right this time.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard?

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Eloysius Gorchekova, Sergeant of the Imperial Guard, Vanguard Battalion, here from Deity Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard?

attributes.content: What are you playing at?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: I have a simple request for you. Overlook this little breach of protocol and release our pitiful guests.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You're with them?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Unfortunately, they are indeed my friends. Since you are now aware of my history with them, surely you'll do me this favor, yes?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We're a long way from Grypherburg, why should I care about that?
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Because I stopped by Public Security and filled out all the paperwork?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The young Ursus waves some papers in her hand. In the dusky gloom of polar night, none can clearly see what is written on them.
But—
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: If I were you, sir, I wouldn't play around with my future like that.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: There are many lost travelers, but rarely a chance to curry favor with the Imperial Guard—Ah, yes, may I ask you your name, or your service number?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Alright, Sergeant Gorchekova. I'll report all this to Public Security. You may go.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: May your authority be as eternally glorious as the Tsar himself.
attributes.name: Far North Soldier

attributes.content: Thank you for the kind words, sir.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But none has as eternal a glory as His Imperial Majesty. The rest of us will have to leave the stage when the time comes.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Well, I'll be off with our guests for now.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Thank you for helping us get out of that sticky situation, ma'am... but, why exactly did you—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Shh, they're still close by.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Also, my cute little Cautus, you may call me Eloysius.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: 'Ma'am' is too formal, while 'Guardswoman' or 'girl' is too crude. I believe names are what's best for our current relationship.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: Thank you for the help, Eloysius.;You really know how to handle those guards.

attributes.content: They most likely thought you were ordinary traders, easy to shake down for a quick chervonets or two, same way they treat Columbian sightseers.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But you're hardly tourists or traders, now, are you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: Let's cut to the chase.;Why are you helping us?

attributes.content: Good, good, I appreciate candor. I will answer your questions, but not here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Once you have gathered your friends, we can go somewhere far from prying eyes and ears.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: We don't have much time.

attributes.content: Relax, I won't be wasting your time. This is all in service of your goal.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Well, here we are.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Where is here?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: An abandoned apartment. As far as I know, the guards don't care for these nigh-empty old districts.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: An empty plate may sound wasteful, but it is true. No matter how the Deity Grypherburg Times tries to cover it up, it is a widely-known fact that the population of the Far Northern cities has been dwindling these last few years.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: As time goes by, this place becomes deserted, and the plate will be discarded, left to rust in the wilderness like all the other abandoned plates.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Eloysius, we need to know exactly why you came looking for us. Now, ideally.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Vigilant stare)
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Could I ask everyone to lighten up a little, please?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: There are a lot of you and only one of me. What kind of threat could I possibly pose to people of your caliber?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Could I ask the Phidia lady standing outside the door to tell your friends that I'm not lying?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Captain says there's nobody else here. The district is safe.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.options: Choosing this place to talk means you also need to be covert.;I had hoped the Imperial Guard would at least treat us to dinner.

attributes.content: A friend of mine used to live here. She had hoped to achieve her dream of completing a saga for the Ursine people, but was defeated by the frigid cold—She is doing very well in Grypherburg, I should add.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But thanks to her, we have this place to shelter both from the cold wind, and from people snooping around.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm sure I'm not the only one here who wants to stay out of trouble.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You're a funny one, my hooded friend. It takes a clever mind to grasp humor.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Once we have discussed our important business, I would be happy to entertain you with a meal if you are all still interested.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Firstly, since I've already introduced myself, may I have the pleasure of knowing your names?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We've come from Victoria and—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Still insisting that you went into the industrial zone to meet with an inter-city merchant, a widow who goes by the name of Olga?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: A very reliable cover story, one that will fool a vast majority of the city's port officials.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But no matter how you put it, it is rare for a commercial party in a nomadic city to be using military-grade encrypted communications.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Was it you intercepting our communications?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: No, no, I would never do something so crude.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It may have been the aurora, or the recently upgraded defense equipment. You truly are unlucky, coming to Bresk during the most interesting times it has ever seen.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I have been honest on my part. If you still have things you wish to keep hidden, then I am afraid we have to break things off here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: We're a pharmaceutical company.;Rhodes Island.

attributes.content: See? Honesty isn't so painful, is it?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Rhodes Island... I have heard this name mentioned many times while investigating Infected rumors from all across the land.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Based on what I have pieced together from these tales, you lot are the stuff of legends.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But no matter how true they are, the most recent instance I have encountered your name was in that paper you published about aberrant changes in the Infected.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: You don't strike me as a colleague in the field.;I never thought you'd be interested in Oripathy studies.

attributes.content: Pardon me for letting you down, but not every newly-minted Grypherburg noble is an uneducated lout.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: There is not a nation on this land that can overlook the Infected question, though their policies in answering it may differ. Anyone with a modicum of common sense would know just how important this scientific achievement of yours is.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But there is one thing I am curious about. Despite this groundbreaking discovery, Rhodes Island has kept a low profile, instead of using it to do more business.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: Is that why you came to find us?;This doesn't explain how you knew our whereabouts.

attributes.content: Oh, that can easily be explained. I think anyone who goes into the Far North's Central Mining District right now is doing it for the same reason.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You mean you also want in?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What, do you not?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We... need to get in.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Sure enough.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You don't have a way into the mining district, and as it turns out, I have need of some Oripathy specialists. The perfect recipe for cooperation.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: So you want us to go into the district with you?

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The authorities here will not look kindly on some Grypherburger sticking her nose into Far Northern affairs, after all.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: As things are, your cover as merchants will do you no good, nor will it help me, so let's forget all the masks and red tape and shake hands right here. That is one solution to all our problems.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But what is it you want to do in the district? And what do you need from us?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Was I not clear?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm hoping Rhodes Island will accompany me into the mining district to collaborate on an investigation into the Infected affair.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The 'Infected affair'? What exactly are you referring to...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Oh, my dear, sweet, naive little Cautus, my patience has its limits, you know. There is no time to be playing dumb.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No, that's a serious question.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We lost contact with one of our mobile medical teams in the Far North's Central Mining District, and we need to find them.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We really have no idea what this 'Infected affair' is, and I hope you will elaborate.
attributes.name: Amiya
Eloysius
attributes.content: You want into the district just for—

attributes.name: Eloysius
attributes.content: Wait, so you really don't know?
attributes.joined: You want into the district just for— Wait, so you really don't know?

attributes.content: That's impossible. To my knowledge, you've built many more medical posts all across Ursus in the past few years—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Simple doubt replaces the suspicion on the young woman's face, before finally shifting to a sudden realization.
She understands how her assumptions have led her astray.
—No. You just said 'mobile medical team'...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No fixed offices means no steady access to a network of contacts with the latest intelligence. I don't know what issues Rhodes Island is currently facing, but it seems the information you have is limited.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And because this is Ursus, you have been unable to do much. Because of your lack of information, you have been blindly running into walls this whole time... Haven't you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Chyort poberi! I was too impatient.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: We really don't know what this 'Infected affair' is.;Does it have to do with Bresk's current state of affairs?

attributes.content: Forget it. Forget I said anything. That favor before was free of charge, no need to thank me.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Wait!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The very fact that you came looking for us means there is the possibility we can work together on this.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Could you not tell us what exactly happened in the mining district?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I really... Gah! I really should have thought things through more before making a choice.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And here I was, thinking you were racking your brains on how to enter the district upon hearing the news. You should know that this information is worth quite a lot on the black market.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We're not that kind of organization... but that doesn't matter right now.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We have a natural reason to be invested in anything to do with the Infected. That's why you came looking for us, wasn't it?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Please, tell us.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Fine, fine! Since I'm already here, I may as well do something, even if it is just for some Infected.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Infected are Ursine citizens, too.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You are correct, precious little Cautus. The Infected are indeed Ursines, and that is before we mention those miners that the Tsar personally promised 'life, not survival'.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The miners are the backbone of Ursus, keeping its war machines running. A fact that those corrupt old nobles and their puppets haven't realized yet.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But even they must know that Ursus must change.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: My word, what am I even babbling about...? Good thing those sharp-tongued, poison-spitting colleagues of mine aren't here, or they would laugh me into my grave.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You should not feel ashamed for this.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Spoken words are like spilled cystymilk: they freeze solid in this weather.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: So what is this 'Infected affair'? It sounds like it has to do with the Infected miners?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Listen, if you dare leak any of this...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You have my word that no matter what you have to say, we will not disclose it.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: There is no benefit to making an enemy out of Ursus. We know that well.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Give me a moment, I need to figure out where to start...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You know, of course, that Bresk borders the Far North's Central Mining District, and is also the largest nomadic city in the north of Ursus.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: This means the city administrates a total of thirty thousand square kilometers' worth of mines scattered across the Far North, alongside two hundred thousand Infected.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.options: We are familiar with the basic facts of this place.;What issues arise in this sort of system?

attributes.content: Please don't look at me like that... Sorry, I knew this sort of talk would anger you.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: But the Tsar does not wish for these Infected miners to be treated as cheap labor. On the contrary, his decrees have shown a lot of care for the people of Bresk.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Things have been going rather smoothly in the city these past few years, until three months ago...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Yes, this is where your company's area of expertise comes in, along with that paper.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Three months ago, large numbers of 'abnormal Infected' were discovered in the Central Mining District. Their symptoms were very similar to the ones described in your paper.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: (Three months ago? Wasn't that...?)
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.options: You mean...?;That's the reason why Bresk is under martial law?
How many 'abnormal' Infected are there in the district?

attributes.content: That's the question.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Right now, nobody knows just how many 'normal' Infected are left in the Central Mining District.
attributes.name: Eloysius
